query: Turkey MGM current temperature readings June 18 2026 extreme temperatures
answer:
## Turkey MGM Temperature Readings — June 18, 2026: Comprehensive Report

### Overview

Data sourced directly from Turkey's **MGM (Meteoroloji Genel Müdürlüğü / Turkish State Meteorological Service)** API at `servis.mgm.gov.tr`. This report covers recorded temperatures from June 17, real-time observations from the overnight of June 17–18, and hourly forecasts for June 18, 2026.

---

### 1. Recorded Maximum Temperatures (June 17, 2026) — 757 Stations

Turkey's **hottest recorded temperature on June 17 was 42.9°C** at the Siverek/Alanyurt Köyü station in **Şanlıurfa** province — an exceptionally high reading.

#### Top Hottest Stations
| Rank | Province | Station | Max Temp (°C) |
|------|----------|---------|---------------|
| 1 | Şanlıurfa | Siverek/Alanyurt Köyü | **42.9** |
| 2 | Mardin | Derik/Kutluca Köyü | 39.2 |
| 3 | Şanlıurfa | Harran/Yenice Köyü | 39.1 |
| 4 | Aydın | Efeler | 38.2 |
| 5 | Diyarbakır | Bağlar (Bölge) | 38.2 |
| 6 | Diyarbakır | Bismil/Yukarısalat | 38.0 |
| 7 | İzmir | Beydağ | 37.7 |
| 8 | İzmir | Kiraz | 37.6 |
| 9 | Şanlıurfa | Haliliye | 37.6 |
| 10 | Mersin | Mut/Çortak Köyü | 37.3 |

**Coldest maximum temperatures** were observed in the northeast highlands: Ardahan (23.2°C), Kars (24.7°C), Trabzon (26.5°C).

**Country-wide averages:** Mean max across 757 stations = **28.0°C**; range from 13.2°C (Rize/İkizdere highland) to 42.9°C.

---

### 2. Recorded Minimum Temperatures (June 17, 2026) — 1,355 Stations

The **coldest overnight low was 3.8°C** at Bolu's Batı Karadeniz Orman Araştırma station (a high-elevation forestry site).

#### Coldest Overnight Lows
| Province | Station | Min Temp (°C) |
|----------|---------|---------------|
| Bolu | Batı Karadeniz Orman Araş. | **3.8** |
| Ankara | Çamlıdere/Çamkoru | 5.5 |
| Van | Çaldıran/Bezirhane Köyü | 5.7 |
| Giresun | Alucra | 5.7 |
| Çankırı | Çerkeş | 5.8 |

#### Warmest Overnight Lows (persistent heat stress)
| Province | Station | Min Temp (°C) |
|----------|---------|---------------|
| Adıyaman | Kahta | **26.2** |
| Şırnak | Güçlükonak | 25.1 |
| Şanlıurfa | Şanlıurfa | 25.0 |
| Diyarbakır | Ergani | 25.0 |

**Country-wide min stats:** Average min across 1,355 stations = **15.0°C**; range from 3.8°C to 26.2°C.

---

### 3. Real-Time Observations (Early morning June 18, ~02:00–02:04 TRT)

| City | Temp (°C) | Humidity | Wind (km/h) | Condition |
|------|-----------|----------|-------------|-----------|
| Şanlıurfa | 27.6 | 27% | 5.8 | Clear |
| Mardin | 27.4 | 24% | — | Clear |
| Diyarbakır | 26.3 | 34% | 2.2 | Clear |
| İzmir | 25.6 | 50% | 8.3 | Partly Cloudy |
| Siirt | 25.3 | 37% | — | Clear |
| Adıyaman | 25.0 | 31% | — | Clear |
| Antalya | 24.3 | 67% | 3.6 | Clear |
| Konya | 23.2 | 70% | 0 | Clear |
| Adana | 23.3 | 100% | 4.7 | Mist/Fog |
| Istanbul | 20.2 | 83% | 13.7 | Partly Cloudy |
| Ankara | 19.2 | 63% | 15.1 | Clear |

---

### 4. MGM Forecasts for June 18, 2026 — Peak Temperatures

MGM is issuing **SCK (Sıcak/Hot) extreme heat codes** for multiple southeastern cities:

| City | Forecast Peak (°C) | Heat Code |
|------|--------------------:|-----------|
| Şanlıurfa | **39** | SCK (Hot) |
| Batman | **39** | SCK (Hot) |
| Diyarbakır | **38** | SCK (Hot) |
| Adıyaman | **38** | SCK (Hot) |
| Mardin | **36** | SCK (Hot) |
| Siirt | **36** | SCK (Hot) |
| Gaziantep | **36** | — |
| İzmir | **33** (feels like 37) | Windy |
| Malatya | **33** | — |
| Konya | **32** | Thunderstorms |
| Adana | **32** (feels like 35) | — |
| Ankara | **29** | Thunderstorms |
| Antalya | **29** (feels like 33) | — |
| Istanbul | **27** | — |

---

### 5. Severe Weather Alerts for June 18

- **Thunderstorms with rain (KGY):** Ankara — afternoon/evening
- **Severe thunderstorms (GSY) with strong gusts:** Konya — gusts up to **68 km/h**
- **Thunderstorms (GSY):** İzmir — late afternoon
- **Extreme heat (SCK):** Southeastern Turkey corridor (Şanlıurfa, Diyarbakır, Batman, Adıyaman, Mardin, Siirt)

---

### 6. Key Extremes Summary

| Metric | Value | Location |
|--------|-------|----------|
| Highest max temp (June 17 actual) | **42.9°C** | Siverek, Şanlıurfa |
| Lowest max temp (June 17 actual) | **13.2°C** | Rize/İkizdere highland |
| Coldest overnight low | **3.8°C** | Bolu highland |
| Warmest overnight low | **26.2°C** | Kahta, Adıyaman |
| Highest forecast June 18 | **39°C** | Şanlıurfa, Batman |
| Max wind gust forecast | **68 km/h** | Konya |
| Temperature range (max) | **29.7°C** spread | Across 757 stations |
| Temperature range (min) | **22.4°C** spread | Across 1,355 stations |

---

key_facts: Turkey's hottest recorded temperature on June 17, 2026 was 42.9°C at Siverek/Alanyurt Köyü, Şanlıurfa province (MGM data)
MGM forecasts June 18 peaks of 39°C for Şanlıurfa and Batman, with SCK (extreme heat) codes issued for multiple southeastern cities
Coldest overnight low recorded was 3.8°C at Bolu's Batı Karadeniz Orman highland station
Warmest overnight low was 26.2°C at Adıyaman/Kahta, indicating sustained heat stress in southeastern Turkey
757 stations reported maximum temperatures with a country-wide average of 28.0°C and range of 13.2°C to 42.9°C
1,355 stations reported minimum temperatures with a country-wide average of 15.0°C and range of 3.8°C to 26.2°C
Thunderstorms with rain (KGY) forecast for Ankara; severe thunderstorms with 68 km/h gusts forecast for Konya on June 18
Southeastern Turkey extremely dry at peak heat: 8-14% relative humidity
Diyarbakır forecast peak 38°C, Mardin and Siirt 36°C, Gaziantep 36°C for June 18
Istanbul forecast peak only 27°C; Ankara 29°C before thunderstorm-related cooling
